name: Managlinat dialanetil
description: CS-917 is a novel inhibitor of fructose 1,6-bisphphosphatase (FBPase) which is one of the rate-limiting enzymes of gluconeogenesis.
indication: Investigated for use/treatment in diabetes mellitus type 2.
mechanismOfAction: In type 2 diabetes, the liver produces excessive amounts of glucose through the gluconeogenesis (GNG) pathway and consequently is partly responsible for the elevated glucose levels characteristic of the disease. CS-917 targets the AMP binding site of fructose 1,6-bisphosphatase (FBPase), inhibiting the GNC pathway.
